title: sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat
description:
This is a continuation of sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat. In the current window, the sm persona again produced two failed runs with explicit truncation signatures at 2026-05-29T13:22:55.492856+00:00 and 2026-05-29T13:22:55.615583+00:00. Both errors name the failure mode directly: JSON parse failure after hitting max_tokens with finish_reason=length. The surrounding activity includes several fast sandbox-style test failures on other personas, but those are zero-cost and diagnostically ambiguous, whereas the sm failures are clear and match the previously escalated factory-side pattern.

The immediate downstream impact in this window is limited because the failing sm runs were followed by a successful sm run at 2026-05-29T13:22:55.636125+00:00, and the recorded cost in these specific events is negligible. Even so, the recurrence after several prior concern documents indicates the truncation condition is still present rather than resolved. The pattern remains attributable to model/settings or dispatch behavior around SM output shaping, not to story-domain logic.

Because this same clear error class has now recurred across multiple L2 intervals, the issue remains investigation-worthy despite the low per-window cost here. The evidence does not support a halt recommendation: there is no queue-stall signal, no prolonged tick, and no sustained high-cost burn in this bundle. But the repeated, self-identifying truncation failures are coherent and persistent enough that L3 judgment is still useful.

evidence.summary_excerpt: This window was active with a cluster of fast sandbox-style failures reporting "tests not green after run" across onboarder, test_implementer, and dev, plus two sm JSON parse failures caused by truncation at max_tokens with finish_reason=length.

evidence.excerpt: persona=sm success=false error="json parse failed at max_tokens=65536 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 9 (char 8)" tokens_out=122880 model=deepseek/deepseek-chat attempt_n=824

persona=sm success=false error="json parse failed at max_tokens=8192 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 7 (char 6)" tokens_out=20 model=deepseek/deepseek-chat attempt_n=825
persona=sm success=true error=null tokens_in=10 tokens_out=20 model=deepseek/deepseek-chat attempt_n=826

{"noteworthy":"Seven failed runs appeared: four ambiguous sandbox-style \"tests not green after run\" failures, one onboarder failure with null error text, and two clearly diagnosable sm truncation failures naming max_tokens/finish_reason=length."}

{"noteworthy":"Onboarder reached a retry storm with 3 failures in one window; sm also failed twice with the same truncation pattern. The onboarder storm is ambiguous test/sandbox noise, but the sm pair reinforces the known truncation issue."}

escalation_reason: Repeated sm max-tokens truncation/finish_reason=length JSON-parse failures continue across multiple watcher-note intervals, including two more occurrences in this window. The pattern is diagnostically clear and factory-attributable, so L3 judgment is needed to assess the persistent SM output/configuration path even though this specific window's measured cost is low.
